description: Style Note nike Capri II shoes for women who are comfort junkies. Designed for the tennis-lover, these shoes are a great combination of comfort and style. Featuring stitch and overlay details on a base colour, the Nike Capri II sneakers are a great add-on to the wardrobe. Team these with jeans and tees for an off-duty do. Product Details Synthetic leather upper for absolute comfort and durability Central lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Padded tongue and collar for all-day comfort Autoclave construction midsole for enhanced cushioning EVA injected midsole for lightweight feel Solid rubber outsole in herringbone pattern for superior grip Pivot point below the big toe mound for superior traction Straight line grooves below toes and heel for traction and stability Material and Care Synthetic Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in sunlight
